name: Almond Cream Cheese Stuffed French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bread into 1-inch slices and cut a pocket into each side.
2. Combine almonds, cream cheese, and preserves and stuff into bread pockets.
3. Beat together eggs, milk, and flavorings (almond extract, vanilla extract, cinnamon).
4. Dip the stuffed bread in the egg mixture and fry in butter until browned on both sides.
5. Serve 2-4 slices per person.
